title: Create More: Parallel Pipes
description: Allows you to have pipes that don't automatically connect with each other akin to encased pipes.
body:
## About

Adds a way to lock the state of the fluid pipes similar to encased pipes. A ponder entry for pipe wrench is added and will provide more details.

## Warning
Version 2.x is not compatible with 1.x and things will break when you update. To mitigate, you'll have to unlock all pipes first before updating. 

## Create More Mods

*   [Linked Remote](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-more-linked-remote)
*   [Parallel Pipes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-more-parallel-pipes)
*   [Pipe Bombs in Packages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-more-pipe-bombs-in-packages)
*   [Package Couriers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-more-package-couriers)
*   Electric Pump (WIP)

## Credits
Sheppenings - initial pipe wrench design
